accident cerebrovascular.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Emergency medicine urgently; Neurologist / stroke team
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: vascular imaging such as CT angiography/carotid imaging as directed.
accident cerebrovascular.short_care_note: Treat as emergency if sudden weakness, facial droop, speech trouble, vision loss, severe headache, imbalance, or confusion. Do not drive; record symptom onset time; seek emergency care.

acquired immuno-deficiency syndrome hiv.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Infectious disease specialist; HIV clinic; primary care for ongoing monitoring
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: HIV Ag/Ab test with confirmatory HIV-1/2 differentiation or NAT as indicated
acquired immuno-deficiency syndrome hiv.short_care_note: Use specialist HIV care; do not stop antiretroviral medicines without clinician advice; practice safer sex; seek urgent care for fever, severe shortness of breath, confusion, or opportunistic infection signs.

adenocarcinoma.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Oncologist; organ-specific specialist depending on suspected site
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: tumor markers only when clinically appropriate
adenocarcinoma.short_care_note: Needs specialist evaluation and tissue confirmation. Seek urgent care for bleeding, severe pain, breathlessness, or rapid deterioration.

adhesion.doctor_type_patient_should_see: General surgeon; gastroenterologist or gynecologist depending on site
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: abdominal/pelvic ultrasound or CT if obstruction suspected
adhesion.short_care_note: Seek urgent care for severe abdominal pain, vomiting, distension, inability to pass stool/gas, or fever.

affect labile.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Psychiatrist; clinical psychologist; primary care for screening
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: consider thyroid tests, CBC/CMP, substance-use screen if indicated.
affect labile.short_care_note: Seek urgent mental-health help if suicidal thoughts, self-harm risk, psychosis, or inability to function. Keep sleep routine and avoid alcohol/drugs.

alzheimer's disease.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Neurologist, geriatrician, or memory clinic; primary care for support
alzheimer's disease.short_care_note: Ensure safe home environment, medication support, caregiver education, and follow-up. Seek urgent care for sudden confusion or stroke-like symptoms.

anemia.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care/internal medicine; hematologist if severe, unexplained, or recurrent
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: stool occult blood or further GI/gynecology workup if bleeding suspected.
anemia.short_care_note: Do not self-treat severe anemia. Seek urgent care for chest pain, fainting, severe shortness of breath, black stool, or heavy bleeding.

anxiety state.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; psychiatrist/psychologist if persistent, severe, panic, or functional impairment
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: consider TSH, CBC, glucose, ECG if palpitations/chest symptoms.
anxiety state.short_care_note: Use breathing/grounding strategies, reduce caffeine/alcohol, maintain sleep. Urgent care if chest pain, fainting, suicidal thoughts, or psychosis.

arthritis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; rheumatologist for inflammatory arthritis; orthopedic specialist for severe degenerative disease
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: uric acid or joint aspiration if gout/infection suspected
arthritis.short_care_note: Avoid overuse during flare; seek urgent care for hot swollen joint with fever, trauma, or inability to bear weight.

asthma.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; pulmonologist/allergist for poor control or uncertain diagnosis
asthma.short_care_note: Use prescribed inhalers correctly; avoid triggers; seek urgent care for severe breathlessness, blue lips, inability to speak, or no relief from rescue inhaler.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: Blood cultures before antibiotics when possible
urinalysis/culture, chest X-ray, wound cultures, and imaging to find source.
bacteremia.short_care_note: Potentially serious. Seek urgent care for fever with chills, confusion, low blood pressure, rapid breathing, or worsening infection.

benign prostatic hypertrophy.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; urologist for retention, hematuria, recurrent UTI, kidney issues, or severe symptoms
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: PSA if appropriate after shared decision
benign prostatic hypertrophy.short_care_note: Seek urgent care if unable to pass urine, fever with urinary symptoms, blood in urine, or severe flank pain.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: baseline labs before mood stabilizers as clinician directs.
bipolar disorder.short_care_note: Maintain sleep routine, avoid alcohol/drugs, do not stop medicines suddenly. Urgent care for mania with risky behavior, psychosis, or suicidal thoughts.

bronchitis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; pulmonologist if recurrent/chronic or COPD/asthma overlap
bronchitis.short_care_note: Hydration, rest, avoid smoke. Seek care for high fever, shortness of breath, chest pain, low oxygen, or symptoms lasting/worsening.

candidiasis oralcandidiasis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; dentist/oral medicine; infectious disease if recurrent/immunocompromised
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: screen for diabetes/HIV or immunosuppression if recurrent.
candidiasis oralcandidiasis.short_care_note: Maintain oral hygiene; review inhaler technique if using steroids; seek care if spreading, painful swallowing, or immunocompromised.

carcinoma.short_care_note: Specialist referral is required; avoid delaying biopsy/staging. Urgent care for bleeding, severe pain, jaundice, neurologic symptoms, or breathlessness.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: cardiac MRI or coronary evaluation if indicated.
cardiomyopathy.short_care_note: Seek urgent care for chest pain, fainting, severe breathlessness, new swelling, or palpitations with dizziness.

cellulitis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; emergency medicine if severe; infectious disease if recurrent/complicated
cellulitis.short_care_note: Mark spreading redness; elevate limb; seek urgent care for fever, rapidly spreading redness, severe pain, confusion, or diabetes/immunosuppression.

cholecystitis.short_care_note: Urgent assessment for right upper abdominal pain with fever, vomiting, or jaundice. Avoid heavy/fatty meals until reviewed.

cholelithiasis biliary calculus.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; general surgeon or gastroenterologist if symptomatic
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: MRCP/ERCP if bile duct stone suspected.
cholelithiasis biliary calculus.short_care_note: Seek urgent care for fever, jaundice, persistent right upper abdominal pain, or vomiting.

chronic alcoholic intoxication.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; addiction medicine; psychiatrist; hepatologist if liver disease
chronic alcoholic intoxication.short_care_note: Do not stop heavy alcohol abruptly without medical advice due withdrawal risk. Seek urgent care for confusion, seizures, vomiting blood, jaundice, or suicidal thoughts.

chronic kidney failure.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Nephrologist; primary care for early CKD
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: renal ultrasound if structural cause suspected.
chronic kidney failure.short_care_note: Control BP/diabetes, avoid NSAIDs unless clinician approves, review medicines, follow kidney diet advice. Urgent care for severe weakness, confusion, chest pain, or very low urine.

chronic obstructive airway disease.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; pulmonologist for severe/recurrent exacerbations
chronic obstructive airway disease.short_care_note: Stop smoking, vaccines, inhaler technique, pulmonary rehab. Urgent care for severe breathlessness, blue lips, confusion, or low oxygen.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: ultrasound + AFP every 6 months for HCC surveillance when indicated.
cirrhosis.short_care_note: Avoid alcohol, review medicines, vaccinate as advised. Urgent care for vomiting blood, black stool, confusion, severe abdominal swelling, fever, or jaundice.

colitis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Gastroenterologist; primary care or emergency if severe
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: fecal calprotectin if inflammatory bowel disease suspected
colitis.short_care_note: Hydration; avoid anti-diarrheals if bloody diarrhea/fever unless clinician approves. Urgent care for dehydration, severe pain, blood, high fever.

confusion.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Emergency medicine if sudden; primary care/neurology/psychiatry depending cause
confusion.short_care_note: Sudden confusion is a red flag. Seek urgent care, especially with fever, weakness, headache, breathlessness, or fall.

coronary arteriosclerosis ,coronary hear.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Cardiologist; primary care for risk management
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: stress test or coronary CT angiography as indicated
coronary arteriosclerosis ,coronary hear.short_care_note: Urgent care for chest pressure, shortness of breath, sweating, fainting, or pain radiating to arm/jaw/back. Manage BP, lipids, diabetes, smoking.

deep vein thrombosis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care/vascular medicine; emergency if severe or pulmonary embolism symptoms
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: CT pulmonary angiography if PE suspected.
deep vein thrombosis.short_care_note: Seek urgent care for leg swelling/pain plus chest pain, shortness of breath, coughing blood, or fainting. Do not massage affected leg.

degenerative polyarthritis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; rheumatologist if inflammatory uncertainty; orthopedic specialist for severe joint damage
degenerative polyarthritis.short_care_note: Exercise within tolerance, weight management, physical therapy. Seek care for sudden hot swollen joint, fever, trauma, or inability to walk.

deglutition disorder.doctor_type_patient_should_see: ENT, gastroenterologist, speech-language pathologist; emergency if choking/aspiration
deglutition disorder.short_care_note: Avoid unsafe foods until assessed; urgent care for choking, drooling, inability to swallow saliva, weight loss, or aspiration symptoms.

dehydration.short_care_note: Use oral rehydration if mild and able to drink. Urgent care for confusion, fainting, very low urine, severe vomiting/diarrhea, or elderly/infant/pregnancy.

delirium.short_care_note: Delirium is urgent, especially if sudden. Avoid restraints unless safety issue; ensure hydration, glasses/hearing aids; seek same-day care.

delusion.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Psychiatrist; emergency if unsafe or acute confusion
delusion.short_care_note: Do not argue aggressively with beliefs; keep environment calm. Emergency help if risk of harm, severe agitation, or sudden confusion.

dementia.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Memory clinic, neurologist, geriatrician; primary care support
dementia.short_care_note: Plan safety, driving/finance review, caregiver support, advance care planning. Urgent assessment if sudden change suggests delirium/stroke/infection.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: infectious disease screening if injection risk
dependence.short_care_note: Seek supervised withdrawal support; emergency care for overdose, severe withdrawal, seizures, confusion, or suicidal thoughts.

depression mental , depressive disorder.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; psychiatrist/psychologist if moderate-severe, recurrent, bipolar features, psychosis, or suicide risk
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: consider TSH, CBC, B12, substance-use review if indicated.
depression mental , depressive disorder.short_care_note: Seek urgent help for suicidal thoughts, inability to stay safe, psychosis, or severe self-neglect. Maintain follow-up and support network.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: oral glucose tolerance or random glucose if symptomatic
diabetes.short_care_note: Follow glucose plan, diet/activity, medication adherence. Urgent care for vomiting, confusion, very high/low glucose, dehydration, or ketone symptoms.

diverticulitis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; gastroenterologist; surgeon if complicated
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: CT abdomen/pelvis if suspected acute diverticulitis
diverticulitis.short_care_note: Seek urgent care for severe/worsening abdominal pain, fever, vomiting, bleeding, or inability to eat/drink.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: Often found on colonoscopy or CT
colon cancer screening as age/risk appropriate.
diverticulosis.short_care_note: High-fiber diet if advised, hydration, activity. Seek care for abdominal pain with fever, rectal bleeding, or black stool.

edema pulmonary.short_care_note: Usually urgent/emergency if shortness of breath, frothy sputum, chest pain, or low oxygen. Sit upright and seek immediate medical care.

effusion pericardial pericardial effusio.short_care_note: Urgent care for chest pain, fainting, severe breathlessness, low BP, or rapid heart rate.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: V/Q scan if CT not suitable
embolism pulmonary.short_care_note: Emergency if sudden shortness of breath, chest pain, coughing blood, fainting, or rapid heartbeat.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: alpha-1 antitrypsin test if early/family history
emphysema pulmonary.short_care_note: Stop smoking, vaccines, inhaler adherence, pulmonary rehab. Urgent care for severe breathlessness, blue lips, confusion, or low oxygen.

encephalopathy.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Emergency/internal medicine; neurologist; hepatologist/nephrologist depending cause
encephalopathy.short_care_note: Treat as urgent, especially with confusion, drowsiness, seizure, fever, or head injury.

endocarditis.short_care_note: Urgent evaluation for fever with heart murmur, IV drug use, prosthetic valve, or embolic signs. Do not delay medical care.

epilepsy.short_care_note: Avoid driving/swimming/heights until cleared; take medicines consistently. Emergency if seizure lasts >5 minutes, repeats, injury, pregnancy, or breathing difficulty.

exanthema.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; dermatologist; infectious disease if febrile/travel/immunocompromised
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: viral testing or throat swab if indicated
exanthema.short_care_note: Seek urgent care for fever with stiff neck, breathing trouble, blistering rash, purple non-blanching rash, or mucosal involvement.

failure heart.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Cardiologist; primary care for stable follow-up
failure heart.short_care_note: Monitor weight/swelling/breathlessness, limit salt if advised, take medicines. Urgent care for severe breathlessness, chest pain, fainting, or rapid worsening.

failure heart congestive.short_care_note: Daily weight if advised, medication adherence, low-salt plan. Emergency care for severe shortness of breath, pink frothy sputum, chest pain, or confusion.

failure kidney.short_care_note: Avoid NSAIDs unless approved, review medications, maintain follow-up. Emergency if low urine, severe weakness, chest pain, confusion, or high potassium symptoms.

fibroid tumor.short_care_note: Seek care for heavy bleeding, anemia symptoms, pelvic pain, or fertility concerns. Emergency for soaking pads rapidly, fainting, or severe pain.

gastritis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; gastroenterologist if persistent/alarm signs
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: stool occult blood if bleeding concern
upper endoscopy if alarm symptoms or persistent/recurrent.
gastritis.short_care_note: Avoid NSAIDs/alcohol if possible; seek urgent care for vomiting blood, black stools, severe pain, fainting, or weight loss.

gastroenteritis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; emergency if dehydration/severe illness
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: stool PCR/culture if bloody diarrhea, severe fever, outbreak, travel, immunocompromised.
gastroenteritis.short_care_note: Oral rehydration. Seek care for blood in stool, severe dehydration, persistent vomiting, confusion, high fever, or infants/elderly/pregnancy.

gastroesophageal reflux disease.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; gastroenterologist if alarm symptoms or refractory
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: Clinical trial of therapy if typical/no alarm
ambulatory pH/impedance monitoring if diagnosis uncertain/refractory.
gastroesophageal reflux disease.short_care_note: Avoid late meals/triggers, elevate head of bed, weight management if relevant. Urgent care for chest pain, vomiting blood, black stool, progressive swallowing difficulty.

glaucoma.short_care_note: Use eye drops as prescribed; urgent eye care for sudden eye pain, red eye, halos, nausea/vomiting, or sudden vision loss.

gout.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; rheumatologist for recurrent/complex disease
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: Joint aspiration for crystals if uncertain
gout.short_care_note: Seek urgent care for hot swollen joint with fever. Hydrate, avoid flare triggers, discuss urate-lowering therapy if recurrent.

hemiparesis.short_care_note: Treat sudden one-sided weakness as possible stroke. Call emergency services; note onset time.

hemorrhoids.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; gastroenterologist/colorectal surgeon if persistent/severe
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: colonoscopy if age/risk/alarm symptoms or unclear bleeding source.
hemorrhoids.short_care_note: Fiber, fluids, avoid straining. Seek care for heavy bleeding, black stool, dizziness, weight loss, or severe pain.

hepatitis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; hepatologist/gastroenterologist; infectious disease if viral
hepatitis.short_care_note: Avoid alcohol and unnecessary hepatotoxic medicines; seek urgent care for jaundice with confusion, bleeding, severe abdominal pain, or persistent vomiting.

hepatitis b.short_care_note: Avoid alcohol, prevent transmission, vaccinate contacts if indicated, follow specialist monitoring. Urgent care for severe jaundice, confusion, bleeding.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: HCV antibody with reflex HCV RNA/NAT
hepatitis c.short_care_note: Curative antiviral treatment is available; avoid alcohol; prevent blood exposure. Urgent care for decompensated liver symptoms.

hernia.doctor_type_patient_should_see: General surgeon; primary care for initial evaluation
hernia.short_care_note: Urgent care for painful irreducible lump, vomiting, abdominal distension, fever, or skin color change over hernia.

hernia hiatal.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; gastroenterologist; surgeon if severe/refractory/complicated
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: esophageal pH/manometry if reflux surgery considered
hernia hiatal.short_care_note: GERD lifestyle measures; seek urgent care for chest pain, vomiting blood, black stool, severe swallowing trouble.

hyperbilirubinemia.short_care_note: Seek urgent care for jaundice with fever, severe abdominal pain, confusion, bleeding, or very dark urine/pale stool.

hypercholesterolemia.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; cardiologist/lipid specialist for very high/familial/ASCVD
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: liver/kidney function before/while therapy as needed.
hypercholesterolemia.short_care_note: Heart-healthy diet, physical activity, smoking cessation, medication adherence. Urgent care for chest pain/stroke symptoms.

hyperglycemia.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care/endocrinologist; emergency if severe with dehydration/ketones
hyperglycemia.short_care_note: Follow diabetes sick-day plan. Urgent care for vomiting, dehydration, confusion, rapid breathing, or ketones/high glucose.

hyperlipidemia.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; cardiologist/lipid specialist if severe/familial
hyperlipidemia.short_care_note: Lifestyle plus medication if prescribed; manage BP/diabetes/smoking. Emergency for heart attack/stroke symptoms.

hypertension pulmonary.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Pulmonologist/cardiologist; pulmonary hypertension center if confirmed
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: V/Q scan/CT angiography if thromboembolic disease suspected
hypertension pulmonary.short_care_note: Urgent care for fainting, chest pain, severe breathlessness, blue lips, or rapid swelling.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: Repeated BP measurements/home or ambulatory monitoring
hypertensive disease.short_care_note: Take medicines consistently, reduce salt, monitor BP. Emergency for chest pain, severe headache with neurologic symptoms, shortness of breath, or confusion.

hypoglycemia.short_care_note: Treat promptly with fast sugar if awake and able; emergency help for confusion, seizure, unconsciousness, or inability to swallow.

hypothyroidism.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; endocrinologist if pregnancy, severe, complex, or unstable
hypothyroidism.short_care_note: Take thyroid medicine consistently if prescribed; urgent care for severe drowsiness, hypothermia, confusion, or breathing difficulty.

ileus.short_care_note: Urgent care for vomiting, abdominal distension, severe pain, fever, or inability to pass gas/stool.

incontinence.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; urologist/urogynecologist; neurologist if neurologic signs
incontinence.short_care_note: Seek care for new incontinence with back pain, weakness/numbness, fever, blood in urine, or urinary retention.

infection.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; emergency/infectious disease if severe
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: chest X-ray or imaging as indicated.
infection.short_care_note: Seek urgent care for sepsis signs: confusion, shortness of breath, clammy skin, extreme pain, fever/low temperature, weak pulse, or low urine.

infection urinary tract.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; urologist/nephrologist if recurrent, complicated, male, pregnancy, kidney involvement
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: creatinine/CBC if febrile or kidney infection suspected.
infection urinary tract.short_care_note: Hydrate; seek urgent care for fever, flank pain, vomiting, pregnancy, confusion, or symptoms in men/elderly/children.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: Rapid influenza molecular/antigen testing if results change management
influenza.short_care_note: Rest, fluids, isolate; consider antiviral early for high-risk or severe illness. Urgent care for breathing difficulty, chest pain, confusion, dehydration, or worsening after improvement.

insufficiency renal.short_care_note: Avoid nephrotoxic medicines unless approved; monitor BP/diabetes; urgent care for low urine, confusion, severe weakness, or chest symptoms.

ischemia.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Depends on site: cardiologist, neurologist, vascular surgeon; emergency if acute
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: Site-directed testing: ECG/troponin for cardiac, brain imaging for neurologic, vascular ultrasound/CTA for limb/organ
ischemia.short_care_note: Acute chest pain, stroke symptoms, cold painful limb, or severe abdominal pain are emergencies.

ketoacidosis diabetic.short_care_note: Medical emergency. Seek immediate care for vomiting, abdominal pain, deep/rapid breathing, confusion, dehydration, or high ketones.

kidney disease.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; nephrologist if reduced eGFR, albuminuria, hematuria, rapid decline, or advanced CKD
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: renal ultrasound if structural disease suspected.
kidney disease.short_care_note: Control BP/diabetes, review medications, avoid NSAIDs if risky. Urgent care for low urine, severe weakness, confusion, chest pain.

kidney failure acute.short_care_note: Urgent evaluation, especially with low urine, dehydration, infection, high potassium symptoms, or swelling/breathlessness.

lymphatic diseases.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; hematologist/oncologist, infectious disease, or vascular/lymphedema specialist depending cause
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: ultrasound/CT of lymph nodes if persistent
lymphatic diseases.short_care_note: Seek care for persistent enlarging nodes, fever/night sweats/weight loss, redness/pain, or limb swelling.

lymphoma.short_care_note: Specialist evaluation required. Seek urgent care for airway compression, high fever, severe weakness, bleeding, or rapid swelling.

malignant neoplasm of breast carcinoma b.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Breast surgeon; medical oncologist; radiation oncologist
malignant neoplasm of breast carcinoma b.short_care_note: Do not delay breast clinic referral for lump, nipple change, skin dimpling, or bloody discharge. Follow oncology plan.

malignant neoplasm of lung carcinoma of.short_care_note: Urgent evaluation for coughing blood, unexplained weight loss, persistent cough, chest pain, or breathlessness.

malignant neoplasm of prostate carcinoma.short_care_note: Discuss risks/benefits of testing and treatment. Urgent care for urinary retention, bone pain with weakness, or blood in urine.

malignant neoplasms.short_care_note: Needs timely specialist evaluation; urgent care for severe pain, bleeding, breathlessness, neurologic deficit, or rapid decline.

malignant neoplasms primary malignant ne.short_care_note: Confirm with tissue diagnosis and staging; seek urgent care for red-flag symptoms or rapid deterioration.

malignant tumor of colon carcinoma colon.short_care_note: Do not delay evaluation for rectal bleeding, iron-deficiency anemia, bowel habit change, or weight loss.

manic disorder.short_care_note: Urgent assessment if reduced sleep, risky behavior, psychosis, aggression, or suicidal thoughts. Avoid alcohol/drugs.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: sentinel lymph node biopsy/staging imaging depending stage.
melanoma.short_care_note: Urgent dermatology review for changing/asymmetric/dark/bleeding mole. Sun protection and skin checks.

migraine disorders.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; neurologist if atypical, frequent, or disabling
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: neuroimaging if red flags such as sudden worst headache, neurologic deficit, cancer/immunosuppression, trauma.
migraine disorders.short_care_note: Track triggers, hydration/sleep, medication plan. Emergency care for sudden worst headache, weakness, confusion, fever/stiff neck, or vision loss.

mitral valve insufficiency.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Cardiologist; cardiac surgeon/valve clinic if severe
mitral valve insufficiency.short_care_note: Follow cardiology monitoring. Seek urgent care for severe breathlessness, chest pain, fainting, rapid worsening swelling, or palpitations with dizziness.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: coronary angiography or CT/stress testing as cardiology directs.
myocardial infarction.short_care_note: Medical emergency if chest pressure/pain, shortness of breath, sweating, nausea, fainting, or pain to arm/jaw/back. Call emergency services; do not drive yourself.

neoplasm.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Oncologist or organ-specific specialist; primary care for initial referral
neoplasm.short_care_note: Needs clinician review to determine benign vs malignant and site. Seek urgent care for bleeding, severe pain, neurologic symptoms, breathlessness, or rapid growth.

neoplasm metastasis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Medical oncologist; palliative/supportive care team as needed; organ-specific specialist
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: biopsy or molecular testing if needed
symptom-directed imaging such as bone scan/brain MRI.
neoplasm metastasis.short_care_note: Specialist oncology care is needed. Urgent care for severe pain, weakness/numbness, confusion, breathlessness, jaundice, or inability to eat/drink.

neuropathy.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; neurologist; endocrinologist if diabetic
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: nerve conduction/EMG if unclear or progressive.
neuropathy.short_care_note: Foot care if diabetic; seek urgent care for rapid weakness, loss of bladder/bowel control, or one-sided stroke symptoms.

neutropenia.short_care_note: Fever with neutropenia is an emergency. Avoid sick contacts and follow clinician infection precautions.

obesity.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; dietitian; endocrinologist/bariatric specialist if severe or complications
obesity.short_care_note: Gradual lifestyle plan and comorbidity screening. Seek care for chest pain, breathlessness, severe depression, or mobility limitation.

obesity morbid.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; obesity medicine/bariatric specialist; dietitian; endocrinologist if metabolic disease
obesity morbid.short_care_note: Needs structured, supervised weight-management plan; urgent care for chest pain, severe breathlessness, or sudden leg swelling.

osteomyelitis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Infectious disease; orthopedic surgeon; wound/diabetes care if relevant
osteomyelitis.short_care_note: Needs timely medical care; urgent if fever, severe pain, diabetic foot wound, spreading redness, or sepsis signs.

osteoporosis.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; endocrinologist/rheumatologist for complex cases
osteoporosis.short_care_note: Fall prevention, calcium/vitamin D as advised, weight-bearing exercise. Seek care after any low-trauma fracture.

overload fluid.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care/internal medicine; cardiologist/nephrologist depending cause
overload fluid.short_care_note: Urgent care for shortness of breath, chest pain, confusion, rapid swelling, or low oxygen.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: CT if diagnosis unclear or not improving.
pancreatitis.short_care_note: Urgent evaluation for severe upper abdominal pain, persistent vomiting, fever, jaundice, or dehydration.

pancytopenia.short_care_note: Seek urgent care for fever, bleeding, severe weakness, shortness of breath, or infection signs.

paranoia.short_care_note: Keep environment calm; urgent help if threats, weapons, self-harm risk, severe agitation, or confusion.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: brain imaging only if atypical features
therapy assessments for mobility/swallowing as needed.
parkinson disease.short_care_note: Exercise/physiotherapy, fall prevention, medication adherence. Seek care for swallowing problems, falls, hallucinations, or sudden worsening.

paroxysmal dyspnea.short_care_note: Urgent care for severe breathlessness, chest pain, blue lips, fainting, or symptoms at rest.

peripheral vascular disease.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Vascular surgeon/vascular medicine; primary care for risk reduction
peripheral vascular disease.short_care_note: Stop smoking, walking program if advised, foot care. Urgent care for cold/painful limb, sudden weakness, nonhealing wounds, or black toes.

personality disorder.short_care_note: Long-term psychotherapy and crisis plan can help. Urgent care for self-harm risk, suicidal thoughts, violence risk, or severe crisis.

pneumocystis carinii pneumonia.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Infectious disease specialist; pulmonologist; HIV specialist
common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: HIV test/CD4 count if status unknown.
pneumocystis carinii pneumonia.short_care_note: Urgent care for shortness of breath, low oxygen, fever, or immunocompromised state.

pneumonia.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; pulmonologist or emergency if severe/high-risk
pneumonia.short_care_note: Seek urgent care for shortness of breath, chest pain, confusion, blue lips, low oxygen, dehydration, or high-risk age/conditions.

pneumonia aspiration.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care/pulmonologist; speech-language pathologist if swallowing issue
pneumonia aspiration.short_care_note: Urgent care for fever with breathing difficulty, choking episodes, confusion, or low oxygen. Avoid unsafe eating until swallow assessed.

pneumothorax.short_care_note: Emergency if sudden chest pain or shortness of breath. Avoid flying/diving until medically cleared.

primary carcinoma of the liver cells.short_care_note: Specialist referral; manage cirrhosis/hepatitis risks. Urgent care for jaundice, confusion, vomiting blood, severe abdominal swelling.

psychotic disorder.short_care_note: Early specialist care is important. Emergency help if danger to self/others, command hallucinations, severe agitation, or confusion.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: imaging if obstruction, recurrent, or not improving.
pyelonephritis.short_care_note: Urgent care for fever/flank pain, vomiting, pregnancy, confusion, or sepsis signs.

respiratory failure.short_care_note: Medical emergency. Seek immediate care for severe breathlessness, confusion, blue lips, exhaustion, or low oxygen.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: baseline metabolic labs if medication started.
schizophrenia.short_care_note: Ongoing psychiatric care and family/support involvement. Emergency care for self-harm risk, command hallucinations, severe agitation, or inability to care for self.

septicemia systemic infection sepsis (in.short_care_note: Medical emergency. Seek immediate care for confusion, fast breathing, low BP, fever/low temperature, clammy skin, extreme pain, or low urine.

sickle cell anemia.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Hematologist; primary care; emergency for crisis complications
sickle cell anemia.short_care_note: Hydration, avoid triggers, vaccines/follow-up. Emergency for fever, chest pain, shortness of breath, stroke symptoms, severe pain, or priapism.

spasm bronchial.short_care_note: Use prescribed rescue inhaler; avoid triggers. Emergency for severe wheeze, inability to speak, blue lips, or poor response to inhaler.

stenosis aortic valve.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Cardiologist; valve clinic/cardiothoracic surgeon if severe
stenosis aortic valve.short_care_note: Urgent care for chest pain, fainting, severe breathlessness, or new heart failure symptoms.

suicide attempt.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Emergency medicine immediately; psychiatrist/crisis mental health team
suicide attempt.short_care_note: Emergency. Do not leave person alone; remove means of harm; contact emergency services/crisis support immediately.

tachycardia sinus.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; cardiologist if persistent/symptomatic; emergency if unstable
tachycardia sinus.short_care_note: Urgent care for chest pain, fainting, severe shortness of breath, confusion, or very rapid persistent heartbeat.

thrombocytopaenia.short_care_note: Avoid trauma/NSAIDs unless clinician approves. Urgent care for heavy bleeding, black stool, severe headache, confusion, or petechiae with fever.

thrombus.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Vascular medicine/hematologist/cardiologist depending site; emergency if acute symptoms
thrombus.short_care_note: Emergency for chest pain, shortness of breath, stroke symptoms, or cold painful limb.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: medication levels if on antiseizure therapy.
tonic-clonic epilepsy tonic-clonic seizu.short_care_note: Protect from injury, place on side, do not put anything in mouth. Emergency if >5 minutes, repeated, injury, pregnancy, or breathing problem.

transient ischemic attack.short_care_note: Treat as urgent stroke warning even if symptoms resolved. Seek emergency assessment promptly.

tricuspid valve insufficiency.short_care_note: Follow cardiology care; seek urgent care for worsening breathlessness, fainting, chest pain, severe swelling, or palpitations with dizziness.

common_tests_to_discuss_with_clinician: upper endoscopy for alarm signs or complications
ulcer peptic.short_care_note: Avoid NSAIDs/alcohol if possible; urgent care for vomiting blood, black stool, severe pain, fainting, or persistent vomiting.

upper respiratory infection.doctor_type_patient_should_see: Primary care; emergency if severe breathing symptoms
upper respiratory infection.short_care_note: Rest, fluids, symptom care. Seek care for shortness of breath, chest pain, high/persistent fever, confusion, dehydration, or high-risk conditions.
